_comment: Hero image slots. build.py reads `src` and overlays the eyebrow/headline as crisp HTML. Placeholders are abstract moon SVGs (tools/gen_placeholders.py). To use generated raster art, drop a PNG into assets/heroes/ and point `src` at it.

splash.alt: A full moon over a midnight horizon scattered with stars
splash.eyebrow: Tetrate AI Gateway · for Apigee & Java developers
splash.headline: Govern LLMs and AI agents at the edge — anchored to what you already know

1.alt: A crescent moon at first rise
1.headline: Why an AI gateway exists

2.alt: A waxing moon over a still horizon
2.headline: The unified multi-provider gateway

3.alt: A bright moon with a measured halo
3.headline: Governance: tokens, cost & quotas

4.alt: A near-full moon behind a guarded sky
4.headline: Security & guardrails

5.alt: A full moon over a constellation of nodes
5.headline: The agentic turn: MCP & tools

6.alt: A moon over a calm, level horizon
6.headline: Observability & operations

7.alt: A full moon at zenith, brightest of the set
7.headline: Capstone — a governed agent platform
